# Read input
N = int(input())
A = list(map(int, input().split()))

# The number of moves required to add all indices to S is exactly N
# Since each index can be added to S once, and the game ends when all are added

# The winner depends on whether N is odd or even
if N % 2 == 1:
    print("Fennec")
else:
    print("Snuke")
